objective: Cycle 10 — BUG-026 biome CRT palette key mismatch fix + encounter card HUD strip
checkpoint: BUG-026 HIGH: BIOME_CRT_PALETTES/PROFILES used shortened keys (broceliande) but callers passed canonical keys (foret_broceliande). All biomes fell back to default palette. Fixed via biome_palette_key() normalizer in MerlinVisual + CRTLayer. Feature: encounter card HUD strip with life bar, biome badge, card counter. 3 files modified, 86 lines net.
